◎简　　介  

　　The film was shot in a single take, without any special effects or stuntmen, with the director driving the car.The idea for this film came to Claude Lelouch after hiring a gyro stabilized camera mount for a film he was working on at the time.While Claude Lelouch refuses to say who the driver was (although believed to be an F1 driver of the time) the car was his own Ferr...
